title: iso42001_dataquality_minimal — ISO/IEC 42001 A.7 Data-Quality Re-Derivation (Axis-2, multi-output)
claim_boundary: Proves the three reported A.7 data-quality figures (completeness / duplicate-rate / positive-rate) are re-derivable from the declared dataset and tamper-evident under the auditor's pinned rules. NOT a judgement that the dataset is fit for training, and NOT ISO/IEC 42001 control conformance. Synthetic data; no customer.
